title: betula × koehnei
intro: Betula × koehnei, a hybrid of the birch tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Betula × koehnei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
